tasks.subject: Task 1: Consent persistence (migration 007 + sqlc queries)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add oidc_consent stored-grants table + sqlc queries; regenerate pkg/db.

**Files:** db/migrations/007_oidc_consent.sql, db/queries/oidc_consent.sql, sqlc.yaml, pkg/db (generated).

**Acceptance:** table PK(account_id,client_id) + FKs cascade; GetConsent(:one []string)/UpsertConsent/DeleteConsent; account_id int32 override; build exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["db/migrations/007_oidc_consent.sql", "db/queries/oidc_consent.sql", "sqlc.yaml", "pkg/db"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec sqlc -- sqlc generate && mise exec -- go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["table + PK + FKs cascade", "GetConsent/UpsertConsent/DeleteConsent generated", "account_id int32", "build exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Consent KV ticket helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single-use account-bound consent ticket in KV (mirror reauth.go), peek + consume.

**Files:** pkg/authn/consent.go, pkg/authn/consent_test.go.

**Acceptance:** DemandConsent/PeekConsent/ConsumeConsent; JSON ConsentTicket{AccountID,ClientID,Scopes,RedirectURI,State}; 10m TTL; single-use + account-bound; tests pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/authn/consent.go", "pkg/authn/consent_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/authn/ -run Consent -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DemandConsent/PeekConsent/ConsumeConsent", "single-use + account-bound", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: authorize.go consent step rewrite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace RequireConsent stub: skip when grant covers (and not prompt=consent), else consent_required (prompt=none) or bounce to /consent with ticket.

**Files:** pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize.go, pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize_consent_test.go.

**Acceptance:** covered→proceed; needed→302 /consent?ticket=; prompt=consent forces; prompt=none→consent_required to RP; RequireConsent=false→proceed; build+vet+tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize_consent_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run Consent -v && mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["skip when covered", "bounce when needed", "prompt=consent forces", "prompt=none consent_required", "trusted skip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Consent app API (context + decision) + routes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /api/prohibitorum/consent?ticket= returns client+scopes; POST records decision (approve→union grant, deny→access_denied) returning {redirect}.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_consent.go, pkg/contract/auth.go, pkg/server/server.go, pkg/authn/errors.go.

**Acceptance:** GET session-gated 200 {client,account,scopes}; invalid ticket→400; POST approve UpsertConsent union + {redirect:return_to} (same-origin guarded); deny→access_denied redirect; ticket consumed; build+vet exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_consent.go", "pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/server/server.go", "pkg/authn/errors.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET context session-gated", "POST approve stores union grant", "POST deny access_denied redirect", "ticket consumed", "return_to same-origin guard"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Federation providers list endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /api/prohibitorum/auth/federation (public) → [{slug,displayName}] from ListUpstreamIDPs.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_federation.go, pkg/contract/auth.go, pkg/server/server.go.

**Acceptance:** 200 JSON array; empty when none; public; build+vet exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_federation.go", "pkg/contract/auth.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go build ./... && mise exec -- go vet ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /auth/federation returns [{slug,displayName}]", "public", "build/vet exit 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Smoke — consent + federation-list backend e2e
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend cmd/smoke to prove consent flow end-to-end + federation-list against live PG + dev server.

**Files:** cmd/smoke/main.go (+ cmd/prohibitorum if --require-consent flag needed).

**Acceptance:** RequireConsent client→authorize 302 /consent?ticket=; GET context asserts client+scopes; POST approve stores grant; re-authorize issues code; remembered skip; prompt=consent re-bounce; deny access_denied; GET /auth/federation array; SMOKE_EXIT=0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go", "cmd/prohibitorum"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go build ./cmd/smoke/...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["consent ticket bounce asserted", "approve stores grant + code issued", "remembered skip", "prompt=consent re-bounce", "deny access_denied", "federation list asserted", "SMOKE_EXIT=0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Frontend scaffold (Vite + Vue 3 + Nuxt UI + Tailwind + Router + i18n + Pinia)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Buildable Vue 3 SPA skeleton in dashboard/ with Nuxt UI v4, Tailwind v4, Router, vue-i18n (zh+en), Pinia, api client, returnTo guard, Vitest — producing dist/.

**Files:** dashboard/** scaffold, mise.toml, root .gitignore.

**Acceptance:** npm install+build emits dist/index.html; npm test (returnTo) passes; Nuxt UI + Tailwind active; i18n zh/en; dist+node_modules gitignored.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard", "mise.toml", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && mise exec -- npm install && mise exec -- npm run build && mise exec -- npm run test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dist/index.html built", "Vitest returnTo test passes", "Nuxt UI + Tailwind active", "i18n zh/en", "dist+node_modules gitignored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Go embed + SPA fallback + CSP
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Embed dashboard/dist; serve same-origin via chi NotFound with strict security headers.

**Files:** pkg/webui/webui.go, pkg/server/server.go.

**Acceptance:** go:embed dist + SPA fallback (asset else index.html); CSP default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; frame-ancestors 'none' + X-Frame-Options DENY; API/protocol routes unaffected; /login serves shell, discovery JSON; build exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/webui/webui.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "mise exec -- go build ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go:embed dist + SPA fallback", "CSP + frame-ancestors none + X-Frame-Options DENY", "API/protocol routes unaffected", "/login serves shell, discovery still JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Login page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /login — passkey + federation buttons + progressive password→TOTP, returning to return_to.

**Files:** dashboard/src/pages/LoginView.vue, components/{PasskeyButton,PasswordTotpForm,FederationButtons}.vue, lib/webauthn.ts, components/PasswordTotpForm.test.ts.

**Acceptance:** read+guard return_to + /me skip (except reauth); passkey begin/complete; federation buttons relative return_to; password→TOTP(204)→return_to; error code mapping; component test passes; build exit 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/LoginView.vue", "dashboard/src/components/PasskeyButton.vue", "dashboard/src/components/PasswordTotpForm.vue", "dashboard/src/components/FederationButtons.vue", "dashboard/src/lib/webauthn.ts", "dashboard/src/components/PasswordTotpForm.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && mise exec -- npm run test && mise exec -- npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["passkey begin/complete", "federation buttons relative return_to", "password->TOTP->return_to", "already-authed skip except reauth", "error code mapping", "component test passes"]}
```
